name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help improve the game
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Open '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

**Expected behaviour**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Game mode (please complete the following information):**
- Game mode: [Solo / Hot-seat / P2P]
- Number of players: [e.g. 2, 4, 6]
- Expansions enabled: [None / Inns & Cathedrals / Traders & Builders]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 115]

**Console errors (if any)**
Open browser developer tools (F12) → Console tab and paste any red errors here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
